footer_desc: Bringing the elegance of modern French cuisine together with the warmth of the Mediterranean.
no_results_desc: No dishes found matching your search criteria.
order_received: Order received! Our kitchen team is getting started.
about_p1: In the heart of Nicosia, Noir & Blanc brings together the elegance of modern French cuisine with the warmth of the Mediterranean. Every plate is a work of art crafted from the season’s freshest ingredients; every sip tells a carefully curated story.
about_p2: Led by Chef Jean-Pierre Moreau, our kitchen reinterprets classic techniques with a contemporary touch. We promise not just a meal, but a gastronomic journey designed to engage all your senses.
features_desc: From starters to desserts, from signature cocktails to our wine cellar...
chef_quote: "Cooking isn’t just combining ingredients; it’s rebuilding memories and emotions on the plate. Each dish is a tribute to the generosity of the earth and the depth of the sea."
chef_bio: With a 25-year career that began in Lyon and matured in Paris’ most prestigious kitchens, he now crowns his journey in the heart of the Mediterranean at Noir & Blanc. He blends the discipline of 3‑Michelin‑star restaurants with the distinctive flavors offered by local producers.
featured_dish_1_desc: Arborio rice with black truffle, parmesan and mascarpone.
featured_dish_2_desc: Slow-cooked duck leg with sautéed potatoes and orange sauce.
featured_dish_3_desc: Classic vanilla French dessert with a caramelized sugar crust.
testimonial_1_text: I never imagined I’d have an experience like this in Nicosia. Every detail—from the music to the service—was perfect.
testimonial_2_text: The truffle risotto was the best I’ve ever had. Trust the sommelier’s pairing recommendations.
testimonial_3_text: Ideal for a romantic dinner. The atmosphere is enchanting and the service is flawless. We’ll definitely be back.
testimonial_4_text: We chose it for a business dinner and our guests were impressed. The cocktail menu is especially creative.
seo_home_desc: Noir & Blanc — a refined gastronomic experience with modern French–Mediterranean cuisine.
seo_menu_desc: Noir & Blanc digital menu — explore categories with filters and quick search.
call_restaurant_hint: Call us directly for ordering and reservations.
reservation_success_hint: Review your details and confirm the reservation.
